title: Raw Iron Press (Spelunkery + Create)
description: Turn Raw Iron Nugget into > Raw Iron using the Create > Mechanical Press.
body:
A tiny datapack for Minecraft instances that use Create.
It lets you press **9 spelunkery:raw_iron_nugget** into **1 minecraft:raw_iron** using the **Mechanical Press**.

Especially useful when playing modpacks like Homestead and and/or in setups where washing gravel produces raw_iron_nugget thanks to Spelunkery.
